description: Analyze themes driven by security, geopolitical rivalry, supply-chain resilience, and strategic stockpiling.
core_questions: What security risk or geopolitical shift created demand?
Which supply chains are being localized, diversified, or stockpiled?
Who controls chokepoints and substitute capacity?
Which companies have qualification, licenses, or strategic relevance?
What de-escalation, budget shift, or substitution would weaken the theme?
